Details: Jar tests of magnetic ion exchange resin (MIEX) showed removal of 32 to 86 percent of DOC and 41 to 68 percent of TOC, with increasing removals at higher resin doses and contact times [2462, 2463, 2464]. Removals were also higher in waters with higher starting specific UV absorbance [2464]. Comparable jar tests using conventional anion exchange resins removed only 7 to 13 percent of DOC, although removals did increase above these levels at high doses and long contact times [2463].
